RAINFALL OF 2 TO 4 INCHES RESULTED IN MINOR ROADWAY FLOODING ACROSS PORTIONS OF NORTHERN AND EASTERN LAKE COUNTY...INCLUDING HIGHWAY 61...NEAR THE LAKE-COOK COUNTY LINE. FLOODING WAS ALSO REPORTED ALONG PORTIONS OF HIGHWAY 3.

RAINFALL OF 3 TO 5 INCHES RESULTED IN WIDESPREAD ROADWAY FLOODING ACROSS COOK COUNTY. TRAVEL WAS RESTRICTED TO ONE LANE ON HIGHWAY 61 IN LUTSEN AND LOCAL LAW ENFORCEMENT WAS WORKING TO REINFORCE THE ROADWAY. OFFICIALS ALSO REPORTED WASHED OUT CULVERTS...ROADBEDS AND DITCHES...AND DEBRIS ON LOCAL ROADWAYS.
